name: Inworld AI
description: Voice AI runtime and TTS for real-time applications and NPC agents, trusted by Google, Nvidia, Meta, Ubisoft, Xbox.

seo.title: Inworld AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Inworld AI: Voice AI runtime and TTS for real-time applications and NPC agents, trusted by Google, Nvidia, Meta, Ubisoft, Xbox.

when_to_use: Powering AI-driven NPCs with persistent memory in games
Building character AI for metaverse and virtual world experiences
Deploying emotionally expressive AI characters in Unity/Unreal
Generating dynamic NPC dialogue responsive to player choices

pros: Trusted by Xbox, Nvidia, Ubisoft for NPCs
Strong TTS and voice cloning quality
cons: Game and NPC focus narrows general use cases
Pricing can surprise at high concurrency
Personality framework has a learning curve
review.verdict: The leading voice AI runtime for games and real-time agents, if latency is non-negotiable.
review.best_for: Game studios and real-time voice product teams needing sub-second response
review.not_for: Simple TTS voiceovers or batch synthesis workloads

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
